name: Spec-Flow
description_en: A spec-driven development workflow that walks a feature from proposal to requirements, design, and task breakdown with phase-by-phase confirmation.
description_zh: 规格驱动的开发工作流,按阶段确认把一个功能从提案推进到需求、设计与任务拆解。
long_en: Creates a .spec-flow/ directory holding the proposal, requirements, design, and tasks, with optional fast and skip-design modes.
long_zh: 生成 .spec-flow/ 目录存放提案、需求、设计与任务,并提供可选的快速模式与跳过设计模式。
sec_note_en: Writes planning documents to your repo; no code is executed.
sec_note_zh: 在你的仓库写入规划文档;不执行任何代码。
